task_completion.description: Navigate to the CRM and locate the lost opportunities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRM pipeline or list view is visible in the web browser, showing the target lost opportunities.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Enterprise License - Summit Financial' opportunity with the correct Lost Reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enterprise License - Summit Financial' record is open or being edited, and its 'Lost Reason' field is explicitly set to 'Price too high'.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Fleet Tracking System - BlueWave Logistics' opportunity with the correct Lost Reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Fleet Tracking System - BlueWave Logistics' record is open or being edited, and its 'Lost Reason' field is explicitly set to 'Lacking Features'.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Cloud Storage Migration - Apex Healthcare' opportunity with the correct Lost Reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cloud Storage Migration - Apex Healthcare' record is open or being edited, and its 'Lost Reason' field is explicitly set to 'Budget Freeze'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the modified opportunities remain in the 'Lost' stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status/stage indicator for the modified opportunities shows they are still in the 'Lost' stage (e.g., a 'Lost' ribbon, badge, or stage pipeline indicator on the record views).

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM web interface to update the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the CRM GUI, not terminal commands, python scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent viewed the chatter history/notes to determine the reasons.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the opportunity form view with the chatter/notes section visible, indicating the agent actually read the notes to make the decision.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database viewer or text editor to modify the backend data directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (like pgAdmin, sqlite3) or text editors are used to alter the records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct mappings for the Lost Reasons are: 1) 'Enterprise License - Summit Financial' must be 'Price too high'. 2) 'Fleet Tracking System - BlueWave Logistics' must be 'Lacking Features'. 3) 'Cloud Storage Migration - Apex Healthcare' must be 'Budget Freeze'. All three opportunities must remain in the 'Lost' stage.
